title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Firstcry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Firstcry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
